description_long: This is a rectangular, open-shelved cabinet or shelf unit made from light-colored wood or wood laminate. The structure features a wide, flat top surface and two vertical dividers that create three open compartments beneath the top. The back panel runs the full width and height of the unit, providing stability and a finished appearance. The sides are solid, and there are no doors, drawers, or visible handles. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for use as a media console, low bookshelf, or storage unit in urban environments such as lobbies, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A light wood open-shelved cabinet with three compartments and a wide, flat top, featuring a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open compartments divided by two vertical panels and a wide top surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the unit and the thickness of the panels, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid back panel with visible mounting or assembly hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and solid construction.
